message:
test(store): add comprehensive vacuum tests with real data

Adds tests that exercise the full vacuum workflow:
- test_vacuum_with_data: Creates table with timestamp column, inserts
  old and new data, verifies dry-run counts correctly, then runs actual
  vacuum and verifies correct rows deleted
- test_vacuum_disabled_policy: Verifies disabled policies are skipped

These tests validate the timestamp column detection using DuckDB's
information_schema.columns works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
